behavior_in_task_description.reason: Instruction names all file paths, constant names (TOOL_NAME_PATTERN, FEATURE_NAME_PATTERN, MAX_TOOL_NAME_LENGTH implied via '52'), TOOL_MAP, GENERATED_TOOL_MAP, schema key CategoryConfigSchema validation, JSON filenames, and documentation heading keywords.

no_solution_leakage.reason: Instruction describes required behaviors and constraints without dictating exact code changes or line edits.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: Tests assert specific identifier names like TOOL_NAME_PATTERN, FEATURE_NAME_PATTERN, MAX_TOOL_NAME_LENGTH via substring checks; an alternative correct implementation using different names (e.g., TOOL_NAME_REGEX) would fail test_tool_name_pattern_validation and test_vitest_file_created.

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: Tests execute pnpm typecheck/build/test/lint-tool-names and run Node subprocesses to exercise the regex patterns, beyond simple text grep.

test_not_tautological.reason: Behavioral tests extract the regex and test accept/reject cases; lint and unit tests run actual scripts that would fail for stubs.

behavior_in_tests.reason: Pattern validation, Zod schema, JSON file linting, unit test creation, and documentation sections are each covered by a test.

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests are grouped with header comments (Gates, Fail-to-pass behavioral, documentation) and have descriptive names.

structured_data_schema.reason: Task does not produce structured data output.

no_typos.reason: Filenames and identifiers appear consistent between instruction and tests.

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: Instruction points to the right files (appropriate for this task) without revealing exact buggy lines.
